settings.title: Say Hello to Theo Behind the Third Chair
settings.excerpt: He trained in Berlin, he is quietly brilliant with curls, and his books are now open.
settings.body:
The third chair at Shearline has a new face, and we could not be happier about it. Theo joined us this month after several years cutting in Berlin.

He is especially good with textured and curly hair, cutting it dry so he can see how it actually falls. He also does a precise short cut that grows out beautifully.

Theo is taking new clients now, and as an introduction his first cut comes with a complimentary deep-conditioning treatment through the end of the month.
